title: Allowlist File (one feed definition)
description: One JSON object per feed, stored in the allowlists/ folder. 'fileName' names the published .ics; 'names' is the people to keep (matched on the event-title name prefix, case-insensitive, trimmed — same rule as feature 001).

fileName.description: Output base name for the feed's .ics. Sanitized to a safe single path segment (letters, digits, '-', '_'); no path separators or '..'. A '.ics' extension is added if absent and never doubled.

names.description: People to keep in this feed. Empty array is valid (produces an empty feed).
